anpTerm: PFD backlight LED accumulated hours
inspectionMethod: PFD control panel LED diagnostic page or visual inspection of backlight brightness
notes: LED brightness degrades to 50% at ~40000 hours; replace at 30000 hours for margin.

anpTerm: MFD backlight LED accumulated hours
inspectionMethod: MFD control panel LED diagnostic page or visual inspection of backlight brightness
notes: LED brightness degrades to 50% at ~40000 hours; replace at 30000 hours for margin.

anpTerm: PFD cooling fan bearing accumulated hours
inspectionMethod: Visual inspection of fan blade rotation and listening for bearing noise during powered check
notes: Fan bearing MTBF ~25000 hours; replace at 20000 hours preventively to avoid thermal runaway.

anpTerm: MFD cooling fan bearing accumulated hours
inspectionMethod: Visual inspection of fan blade rotation and listening for bearing noise during powered check
notes: Fan bearing MTBF ~25000 hours; replace at 20000 hours preventively to avoid thermal runaway.

anpTerm: PFD backup coin cell battery shelf life remaining
inspectionMethod: Visual inspection of coin cell battery case for corrosion; functional check of RTC after power removal
notes: Replace at 5-year mark or visually detected corrosion, whichever comes first.

anpTerm: MFD backup coin cell battery shelf life remaining
inspectionMethod: Visual inspection of coin cell battery case for corrosion; functional check of RTC after power removal
notes: Replace at 5-year mark or visually detected corrosion, whichever comes first.

anpTerm: GIA63W integrated avionics module #1 accumulated hours
inspectionMethod: Functional test of avionics module via G1000 diagnostics; inspect for thermal damage or component derating
notes: GIA63W solid-state module thermal cycle life ~20000 hours; redundant pair means gradual degradation acceptable.

anpTerm: GIA63W integrated avionics module #2 accumulated hours
inspectionMethod: Functional test of avionics module via G1000 diagnostics; inspect for thermal damage or component derating
notes: GIA63W solid-state module thermal cycle life ~20000 hours; redundant pair ensures continued operation.

anpTerm: GRS77 AHRS gyroscope drift rate in degrees per hour
inspectionMethod: AHRS drift test per G1000 diagnostics; compare heading hold accuracy over 5-minute level flight
notes: Fiber-gyro drift accumulates with thermal cycling; replace at 0.5°/h or per G1000 AHRS TEST page.

anpTerm: GRS77 AHRS accelerometer bias offset in G units
inspectionMethod: AHRS bias test per G1000 diagnostics during level flight; compare vertical speed indication to known performance
notes: Accelerometer bias drives altitude hold errors; G-excursions and thermal cycling accelerate drift.

anpTerm: GMU44 magnetic field calibration error in degrees bearing error
inspectionMethod: Magnetometer calibration test per G1000 magnetic variation page; perform compass swing per A&P procedures
notes: Magnetometer drift ~±2° triggers autopilot heading mode overshoot; recalibrate annually or after lightning proximity.

anpTerm: GDC74A air data computer pressure transducer drift in inHg absolute
inspectionMethod: GDC74A pressure test per G1000 diagnostics; compare altitude to known field elevation and published charts
notes: Pressure transducer drift >0.05 inHg causes altitude error >100 ft; replace at service limit.

anpTerm: GDC74A air data computer temperature probe drift in degrees Celsius
inspectionMethod: GDC74A temperature test per G1000 diagnostics; compare TAT readout to known ambient during cruise
notes: Temperature probe aging causes TAT error affecting true airspeed calculation; secondary impact on altitude.

displayName: GEA71 Engine/Airframe Unit Thermal Cycle Count
anpTerm: GEA71 engine/airframe module accumulated thermal cycle count
inspectionMethod: GEA71 cycle count readout via G1000 ENGINE menu; visual inspection for solder joint integrity
notes: Each engine start/shutdown cycle stresses GEA71 solder joints; thermal cycle limit ~5000 cold-start cycles.

anpTerm: GMA350 audio panel internal relay contact material removal
inspectionMethod: Functional audio and radio mute test; bench test audio panel relays for contact resistance >100 mOhm
notes: Relay contact wear accumulates with each radio transmit/receive cycle; replace at ~200k cycles or visible pitting.

anpTerm: GMA350 intercom amplifier accumulated operating hours
inspectionMethod: Intercom functional test per G1000 audio diagnostics; measure sidetone amplitude and frequency response
notes: Amplifier output transistor thermal aging limits life to ~15000 hours; replace at service limit.

anpTerm: COM1 final stage RF amplifier accumulated operating hours
inspectionMethod: COM1 RF power output measurement per G1000 diagnostics; bench test final amp output power at rated frequency
notes: Final amp transistor degradation reduces transmit power; replace at 12000 hours or <4 W output.

anpTerm: COM2 final stage RF amplifier accumulated operating hours
inspectionMethod: COM2 RF power output measurement per G1000 diagnostics; bench test final amp output power at rated frequency
notes: Final amp transistor degradation reduces transmit power; replace at 12000 hours or <4 W output.

anpTerm: COM1 antenna voltage standing wave ratio
inspectionMethod: Antenna VSWR measurement with RF analyzer; visual inspection of antenna connector and cable for corrosion
notes: VSWR >1.5:1 indicates antenna degradation or connector corrosion; forces final amp to run hot, accelerating failure.

anpTerm: COM2 antenna voltage standing wave ratio
inspectionMethod: Antenna VSWR measurement with RF analyzer; visual inspection of antenna connector and cable for corrosion
notes: VSWR >1.5:1 indicates antenna degradation or connector corrosion; forces final amp to run hot, accelerating failure.

anpTerm: NAV1 intermediate frequency stage frequency drift in Hz
inspectionMethod: NAV1 IF frequency calibration check; measure receiver frequency response at ±50 kHz offset from nominal
notes: IF stage drift causes NAV1 course offset and reduced sensitivity to weak stations; replace at 500 Hz drift.

anpTerm: NAV2 intermediate frequency stage frequency drift in Hz
inspectionMethod: NAV2 IF frequency calibration check; measure receiver frequency response at ±50 kHz offset from nominal
notes: IF stage drift causes NAV2 course offset and reduced sensitivity to weak stations; replace at 500 Hz drift.

anpTerm: Glideslope receiver sensitivity degradation in dBm per dot
inspectionMethod: Glideslope sensitivity bench test using RF simulator; document signal strength for full-scale deflection
notes: Glideslope LNA and mixer aging reduces sensitivity; replace when <-85 dBm required for full scale.

displayName: Marker Beacon Receiver IF Capacitor Aging
anpTerm: Marker beacon receiver intermediate frequency stage capacitor aging in percent capacitance loss
inspectionMethod: Marker beacon sensitivity and tone frequency measurement; bench test IF cap ESR and capacitance value
notes: Marker beacon receiver caps age from thermal cycling; replace IF module at 5% capacitance loss or frequency drift.

anpTerm: DME transponder accumulated operating hours
inspectionMethod: DME ground check using known distance waypoint; bench test final amp output power and receiver sensitivity
notes: DME optional on many C172 G1000 NXi; if installed, final amp and receiver LNA limit life to ~8000 hours.

anpTerm: GMA350 sidetone output level drift in decibels below nominal
inspectionMethod: Sidetone amplitude measurement during transmit with audio analyzer; compare to manufacturer calibration baseline
notes: Sidetone amplifier output degradation reduces pilot feedback during transmit; replace at -6 dB.

anpTerm: GTX33 transponder accumulated thermal cycle hours (proxy for solid-state solder joint stress)
inspectionMethod: Transponder mode C functional test and ground check; bench test altitude encoder output and mode S reply rate
notes: GTX33 solid-state module solder joints degrade with thermal cycling; thermal cycle life ~18000 hours.

anpTerm: Transponder reply rate to ATC interrogations as percent of nominal
inspectionMethod: Transponder reply rate test using ATC simulator or ground station; document percentage of replies received per interrogation burst
notes: Thermal cycling degrades GTX33 receiver sensitivity and reply amplifier, reducing ATC radar contact reliability.

anpTerm: ADS-B Out message transmission rate and accuracy compliance
inspectionMethod: ADS-B Out message analysis via portable receiver at known location; verify message rate >1 Hz and payload accuracy
notes: Compliance requires <2 second message latency, pressure altitude accuracy, and correct position source; inherits drift from AHRS and air data.

displayName: ADS-B Out Position Source Uncertainty Drift
anpTerm: ADS-B NACp (navigation accuracy category position) degradation
inspectionMethod: ADS-B NACp readout via G1000 diagnostics; portable receiver comparison at known waypoint to verify reported accuracy
notes: ADS-B NACp degrades as AHRS drift accumulates; FAA requires NACp ≤37 m for compliance.

anpTerm: Difference between mode C altitude and pressure altitude in feet
inspectionMethod: Mode C altitude comparison test using known field elevation and G1000 displayed altitude; ATC radar altitude check at cruise
notes: Mode C error >100 ft indicates air data encoder or pressure transducer drift; FAA tolerance is ±100 ft.

anpTerm: Antenna ground plane/cable connector corrosion severity rating
inspectionMethod: Visual inspection of antenna mounting ground plane and cable connector for green/white corrosion; continuity resistance check <1 Ohm
notes: Salt air and moisture corrode transponder antenna ground plane; clean or replace as needed; >2 Ohm resistance causes signal loss.

anpTerm: GFC700 pitch servo DC motor brush material remaining
inspectionMethod: Pitch servo functional test per autopilot diagnostics; bench test servo motor commutation and brush resistance
notes: GFC700 pitch servo brush life ~5000 engine start cycles; replace servo at 10% remaining material.

anpTerm: GFC700 pitch servo output gearbox backlash in degrees
inspectionMethod: Pitch servo mechanical inspection; measure backlash by applying hand pressure to output arm and observing deflection
notes: Gear wear increases pitch servo backlash, causing autopilot oscillation and hunt; replace gearbox at 2.0° backlash.

displayName: GFC700 Pitch Servo Torque Limit Slip Clutch
anpTerm: GFC700 pitch servo slip clutch engagement torque in in-lbf
inspectionMethod: Slip clutch torque measurement bench test; apply increasing torque to output shaft until clutch slips
notes: Slip clutch friction material wears with each engagement; replace servo when clutch torque drops below 12 in-lbf.

anpTerm: GFC700 roll servo DC motor brush material remaining
inspectionMethod: Roll servo functional test per autopilot diagnostics; bench test servo motor commutation and brush resistance
notes: GFC700 roll servo brush life ~5000 engine start cycles; replace servo at 10% remaining material.

anpTerm: GFC700 roll servo output gearbox backlash in degrees
inspectionMethod: Roll servo mechanical inspection; measure backlash by applying hand pressure to output arm and observing deflection
notes: Gear wear increases roll servo backlash, causing autopilot oscillation and hunt; replace gearbox at 2.0° backlash.

displayName: GFC700 Roll Servo Torque Limit Slip Clutch
anpTerm: GFC700 roll servo slip clutch engagement torque in in-lbf
inspectionMethod: Slip clutch torque measurement bench test; apply increasing torque to output shaft until clutch slips
notes: Slip clutch friction material wears with each engagement; replace servo when clutch torque drops below 12 in-lbf.

displayName: GFC700 Pitch Trim Servo Screw Thread Wear
anpTerm: Pitch trim servo ball screw thread material loss in percent
inspectionMethod: Pitch trim servo bench test measuring linear actuation rate; inspect screw for pitting and preload loss
notes: Ball screw thread wear reduces trim speed and increases backlash; replace servo at 15% wear.

displayName: GFC700 Yaw Damper (if installed) Accumulated Hours
anpTerm: Yaw damper servo accumulated operating hours
inspectionMethod: Yaw damper functional test per autopilot diagnostics; bench test servo motor and solenoid valve operation
notes: GFC700 base often omits yaw damper; if installed, servo life ~6000 hours before output valve leakage increases.

anpTerm: Emergency Locator Transmitter battery shelf life in months remaining
inspectionMethod: Visual inspection of ELT battery expiration date on unit; functional self-test of ELT battery voltage via ELT control unit
notes: ELT battery must be replaced at 50% shelf life or 12 months in-service, whichever comes first per TSO-C91a.

anpTerm: ELT G-switch activation test cycle count
inspectionMethod: ELT functional test log review; visual inspection of G-switch for mechanical wear or spring relaxation
notes: ELT G-switch must not be tested more than 5 times per TSO-C91a; each test cycle fatigues mechanical components.

anpTerm: ELT antenna structural integrity rating
inspectionMethod: Visual inspection of ELT antenna for cracks, corrosion, or deformation; electrical continuity check at antenna feed point
notes: ELT antenna corrosion or cracking reduces transmission range; replace antenna whip or ELT unit at condition rating 3.

anpTerm: ELT structural mounting fastener security status
inspectionMethod: Visual inspection of ELT mounting tray and fasteners; verify all fasteners tight per A&P procedures and check for cracks in tray
notes: Vibration and G-loading loosen ELT fasteners; re-torque and inspect at each annual or after excessive G event.

anpTerm: Standby attitude indicator gyroscope bearing friction in in-oz per revolution
inspectionMethod: Standby AI gyro spin-up test and precession rate measurement during cruise; bench test bearing drag by spin torque measurement
notes: Gyro bearing wear increases friction and erection time; replace standby AI at 2.0 in-oz bearing drag or visible evidence of bearing wear.

anpTerm: Standby airspeed indicator Bourdon tube hairspring relaxation in knots
inspectionMethod: Standby ASI comparison test at known airspeed; bench test Bourdon tube response and hairspring preload tension
notes: Hairspring relaxation causes progressive high bias on standby ASI; replace at 5 knots error or older than 15 years.

anpTerm: Standby altimeter Bourdon tube hysteresis error in feet
inspectionMethod: Standby altimeter hysteresis test via pressure chamber; apply ascending then descending pressure and compare altitude readings at same pressure points
notes: Bourdon tube stiction and friction increase hysteresis; replace standby altimeter at 75 feet hysteresis or older than 15 years.

anpTerm: Magnetic compass deviation after last swing in degrees
inspectionMethod: Magnetic compass swing per A&P procedures using compass rose or known magnetic headings; compare compass to G1000 heading with GMU44 calibration removed
notes: Compass swing required annually or after lightning strike; deviation >10° requires swing or internal card realignment.

anpTerm: Magnetic compass expansion chamber bubble size and migration status
inspectionMethod: Visual inspection of compass bowl for fluid clarity and bubble size; rotate aircraft and observe card movement for stiction
notes: Compass fluid evaporation or leakage causes bubble formation; refill or replace compass at condition rating 2 (significant bubble impacting readability).
